summary: Key data for helicopter search interest Feb 3-14 2026
content: Weekly data: Feb 1 week = 32 (lowest since Dec 7). Recent decline from 37->35->37->32. Daily data: Feb 3 = 59, which is at local low (3-month avg = 66.5, recent range 55-100). Super Bowl ~Feb 8 could generate helicopter-related searches (security flights already in news). Monte Carlo with zero drift: 42.5% increase, 55.7% decrease, 1.9% no change. With mean reversion: 51% increase, 46.5% decrease, 2.5% no change.
